description_long: This tower is a stylized, blocky representation reminiscent of the Eiffel Tower, featuring a wide, arched base with four distinct legs that converge into a narrow, tiered shaft. The structure is composed of stacked, cubic segments, giving it a pixelated or voxel-like appearance. The base is surrounded by a green, landscaped area with small shrub-like details, and the archway at the bottom is prominent and central. The shaft of the tower is punctuated by small protrusions or ledges at regular intervals, leading up to a pointed cap at the top. The color palette is dominated by shades of gray, with accents of green and hints of yellow or gold at the top. The overall design is simple yet iconic, evoking a famous urban landmark in a playful, digital style.
description: A blocky, stylized tower with a wide arched base, tiered shaft, and landscaped green surroundings, resembling a digital version of the Eiffel Tower. The structure is mostly gray with green and gold accents.
description_view_0: The tower is seen from the front, showing the central archway and landscaped base with greenery on the left side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front arch and more greenery on both sides of the base, with the shaft and top cap clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear of the tower is visible, with the archway and base details mirrored, and less greenery compared to the front.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the tower shows the archway and a patch of greenery on the right, with the shaft and cap in full view.
